mission_directive: Rebuild the Lunar Pathfinder as a multi-agent cognitive system operating on a spherical moon surface. Ignore all interface artifacts; focus on the data-kinetic bridge.

surface_engine.logic: Raycast-based height sampling for spherical UV mapping. Brighter = High Density Regolith (Ridges).

architect.input: 257x257 Grayscale PNG [Planar Projection of Sphere Sector]
architect.constraint: No Straight Lines. Deep technical analysis of gradient variance based on visual terrain markers (craters, ridges, boulders).

povodir.input: Architect Spline + Monte Carlo Risk Vector
povodir.logic: Follows the Architect's 'Dream' while honoring the Accelerator's 'Reality'. Throttles and steers to stay in Green Futures.

metrics.sCVaR: Spectral Conditional Value at Risk (Severity of potential wreck)
metrics.SMaR: Safety Margin at Risk (Rotational stability buffer)

operational_truth: Standardize on 100% transparency. If the Cognitive Bridge (AI-to-Physics) is broken, the mission is FATAL. No heuristic masks. No fake feedback.
restoration_key: Build spherical physics first. Wrap the Architect's waypoints on the sphere. Feed the Povodir the Monte Carlo fan to avoid rollover on crater rims. The goal is not just pathfinding, but surviving the topography.
